summary: Glitch-fix verification pass for Influencer Connect. All landing page elements render correctly. Shader RAF-pause fix confirmed working (canvas mounted but RAF not running on landing page). Spline scene loads (INITIALISING ANTON state visible). All CTA buttons functional. Glass cards present (glass-1:4, glass-2:15, glass-3:2). Integration bar, pricing section, and footer all render. Hero text is white (rgb(255,255,255)) — NOT incorrectly teal. Only expected console errors: 401 on /api/auth/me and Spline GPU stall warnings (GL_CLOSE_PATH_NV ReadPixels — unavoidable from Spline).
critical_code_review_comments: shader-background.jsx: active prop correctly implemented — RAF loop paused when active=false, canvas still mounted in DOM (intentional per design)
App.js line 49-53: isLanding check correctly passes active={!isLanding} to ShaderBackground
No layout shift or duplicate layoutId issues detected in this pass
test_credentials: No login required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All glitch-fix changes verified working: (1) ShaderBackground active prop pauses RAF on landing page; (2) Spline robot INITIALISING ANTON visible; (3) CTA buttons route to auth correctly; (4) glass-1/2/3 CSS classes applied; (5) Hero text white not teal. GPU stall warnings from Spline are expected and unavoidable.
mocked_apis: Attio CRM and lemlist are MOCKED/simulated integrations
